paragraphs.text: This Privacy Policy explains how Sickness Labs (“we”, “us”) handles information when you visit sicknesslabs.com (the “Website”).
We do not collect any personal information such as names, email addresses, or billing details. The Website has no user accounts, forms, or login functionality.

We use Google Analytics 4 (GA4), deployed through Google Tag Manager (GTM), to understand how visitors interact with the Website. GA4 collects anonymized usage data including pages visited, session duration, approximate location (country/city level), device type, browser, and referral source.
GA4 uses first-party cookies to distinguish unique visitors. No data that personally identifies you is sent to Google. IP addresses are automatically anonymized by GA4.
You can learn more about how Google processes data at google.com/policies/privacy/partners.
The Website uses only cookies required for analytics:

_ga — Google Analytics — Distinguishes unique visitors — 2 years
_ga_* — Google Analytics — Maintains session state — 2 years
No cookies are set until you provide consent through the cookie banner.

When you first visit the Website, a consent banner is displayed. Analytics cookies are loaded only after you accept. You can withdraw consent at any time by clearing your cookies or using the consent settings available on the Website.
We comply with the EU User Consent Policy as required by Google.
Analytics data is retained in GA4 for 14 months, after which it is automatically deleted.

Data collected through GA4 is processed by Google LLC. Google acts as a data processor under the Google Ads Data Processing Terms. Data may be transferred to the United States under Google’s standard contractual clauses.

Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, or restrict processing of your data. Since we do not collect personal information directly, these rights primarily apply to data held by Google. You can manage your Google activity at myactivity.google.com.
You can also opt out of Google Analytics entirely by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at privacy@sicknesslabs.com.

seo.title: Privacy Policy — Sickness Labs
seo.description: How Sickness Labs handles your data. We use Google Analytics 4 with consent-based cookies. No personal information is collected directly.
